title: Intelligent Multi-Agent Analysis
text: Event Horizon combines the power of multiple specialized AI agents working in parallel to provide comprehensive market analysis. Built with React 19 and modern AI technologies.

section.title: 5 Specialized Data Agents
section.content: Our system deploys five specialized agents - Candlestick, Earnings, News, Technical, and Fundamentals - each focusing on specific data types to provide comprehensive market insights.

section.title: Flexible LLM Support
section.content: Choose from multiple AI providers including OpenAI (GPT-4o, O1, O3), Anthropic (Claude), Google (Gemini), or run models locally with Ollama and vLLM.
